data.body: In agent-adapter.ts: replace 'openrouter' with 'opencode' in AgentDialect. Update resolveDialect() to detect opencode. Add opencode arg building in buildPromptModeArgs(): `opencode run --format json -m <model> <prompt>`. Replace openrouter passthrough in createLineNormalizer() with opencode JSON event normalizer (step_start→skip, text→assistant message, step_finish→result).
data.title: Add OpenCode dialect to agent-adapter
